original_image_tags: Hand-drawn side-profile sketch of a swept-wing jet aircraft. The nose is on the left, tail on the right. The drawing is annotated with multiple arrows pointing to specific features.
Hand-drawn sketch of an octagonal paving stone or brick, shown from above.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Hand-drawn aircraft profile sketch titled “Dnieperpetrovsk Airfield Jet Bomber Profile – 9 Oct. 55,” with arrows and labels identifying cockpit set forward, canvas covered, swayback appearance, jet engines canvas covered on wings, severe sweep to mid-wing, low set tail plane, nose wheel, silver (not glass) bulge, and a separate octagonal “design of brick on ramp at airfield – asphalt seams” diagram.*
